zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Meynell於1337年之後出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親Hugh de Meynell19996歲，母親Alice de Audley8700歲。她於大約1369年11月2日與Sir Gerard Braybrooke III在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1393年4月25日在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國貝德福爾貝德福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Meynell于1337年之后出生在英国英格兰时，她的父亲Hugh de Meynell19996岁，母亲Alice de Audley8700岁。她于大约1369年11月2日与Sir Gerard Braybrooke III在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1393年4月25日在她的家乡，埋葬在英国貝德福爾貝德福德。

nameMeanings.name: Meynell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1 Norman, English: locative name from one of the French places named Mesnil, from Old French mesnil (Latin * mansionile, a diminutive of mansio ‘abode, habitation’), used of the country domain where a noble lived with his family and retainers. As a surname it may also be used of a member of the household, retainer. Some of the bearers listed below may belong to (2).
2 English: relationship name from the Continental Germanic female personal name Maginhild.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Meynell was born after 1337, in England, United Kingdom, her father, Hugh de Meynell, was 19996 and her mother, Alice de Audley, was 8700. She married Sir Gerard Braybrooke III about 2 November 1369, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 25 April 1393, in her hometown, and was buried in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Meynell est née après 1337, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh de Meynell, avait 19996 ans et sa mère, Alice de Audley, avait 8700 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Gerard Braybrooke III environ 2 novembre 1369, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 25 avril 1393, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Bedford, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Meynell nach 1337 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Meynell 19996 und ihre Mutter Alice de Audley 8700. Sie hat um 2. November 1369 in England, United Kingdom Sir Gerard Braybrooke III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 25. April 1393 in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Meynell è nata il dopo il 1337 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Hugh de Meynell, aveva 19996 anni e sua madre, Alice de Audley, aveva 8700 anni. Lei sposato Sir Gerard Braybrooke III circa 2 novembre 1369, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 25 aprile 1393, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a Bedford, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Meynellが1337年以後にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Hugh de Meynellは19996歳，母Alice de Audleyは8700歳であった。約1369年11月2日にイギリスイギリスでSir Gerard Braybrooke IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1393年4月25日に故郷で死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアベドフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Meynell(이)가 1337년 이후 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Meynell(은)는 19996세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Audley(은)는 8700세였다. 그녀는 대략 1369년 11월 2일 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Gerard Braybrooke III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1393년 4월 25일 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 베드퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Meynell nasceu após 1337, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh de Meynell, tinha 19996 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Audley, tinha 8700 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Gerard Braybrooke III aproximadamente 2 de novembro de 1369, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 25 de abril de 1393, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Meynell родилась после 1337 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hugh de Meynell было 19996 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Audley, 8700. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Gerard Braybrooke III около 2 ноября 1369 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 25 апреля 1393 г. в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности бедфорд, бедфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Meynell nació después de 1337, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh de Meynell, tenía 19996 años y su mamá, Alice de Audley, tenía 8700 años. Se casó con Sir Gerard Braybrooke III aproximadamente 2 de noviembre de 1369, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 25 de abril de 1393, en su pueblo, y fue sepultada en Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.
